system.description: The Explorer stitches augmetic coils throughout the systems or flesh of his legs, granting him the ability to float a short distance above the ground.
system.benefit: Using a Half Action, the Explorer may hover 20 to 30 centimetres off the ground for a number of minutes equal to 1d10 plus his Toughness Bonus. He must employ a Half Action each round to maintain the rite, may use his other actions to move normally, can slow his rate of descent when falling to reduce all falling Damage to 1d10+3 Impact, and cannot use the Talent again until the Potentia Coil is recharged.

specialAbilities.name: Hover
specialAbilities.description: Half Action: Hover 20 to 30 centimetres above the ground for 1d10 plus Toughness Bonus minutes. You must spend a Half Action each round to maintain the rite, may otherwise move normally, and may reduce falling Damage to 1d10+3 Impact. Each use exhausts the Potentia Coil until it is recharged.
